product_overview: Carrera LTI is a local-first PWA that unifies academic management, a Second Brain (Aether) and an AI-enabled workspace (Nexus) for UTEC Plan 2024 students. It centralizes schedule, subjects, tasks, notes and multi-source AI tools into a single offline-ready super-app.
core_goals: Provide an integrated workflow that reduces cognitive load by linking the curricular map (Malla) with subject workspaces (Aether) and execution workspaces (Nexus).
Enable robust offline-first operation with local persistence (IndexedDB/Dexie) and optional cloud sync via Firebase.
Offer productivity primitives (drag-and-drop schedule generator, Kanban tasks, Pomodoro) and AI-assisted synthesis (RAG via Google Gemini) with contextual, on-demand API disclosure.
Protect user intellectual property with local encryption (PBKDF2 + AES-GCM) and client-side data sovereignty.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Central overview of semester KPIs, progress charts, countdowns and quick links to modules.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See KPIs: promedio, créditos y cuenta regresiva -> Click subject card to open subject details modal -> See subject details and quick actions

Navigate to / -> See KPIs -> Observe external Gmail widget not present -> See 'Connect Gmail' CTA in notifications -> Click 'Connect Gmail' CTA -> See contextual modal requesting API Key (divulgación progresiva)

features.name: Malla Curricular (Curriculum Map)
features.description: Interactive 8-semester grid that displays credits, prerequisites and allows state changes per subject to drive automation across the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /malla -> See interactive grid of 8 semesters and credit progress bars -> Click a subject in Semester 1 -> Click 'Mark as En Curso' -> See subject state change to 'en curso' in the grid -> Navigate to /aether -> See folder created with matching Subject ID

Navigate to /malla -> Click a subject -> Click 'Mark as En Curso' -> See toast 'Failed to create workspace' -> Click 'Retry Sync' -> See retry attempt and either 'Workspace created' or persistent error

features.name: Subject Management (Materias)
features.description: List and manage units (U.C.) with status, grades, filtering and links to resources.
user_flows: Navigate to /materias -> Filter subjects by semester '1' -> Toggle subject status to 'en curso' -> Click edit grades -> Fill grade field -> Click Save -> See updated grade and status displayed
Navigate to /materias -> Toggle subject status to 'aprobada' -> See error toast 'Unable to update subject' -> Click Retry -> See status unchanged or changed after retry

features.name: Task Management (Tareas) — Kanban
features.description: Create, prioritize and track academic tasks using a Kanban board with subtasks, due dates and completion controls.
user_flows: Navigate to /tareas -> Click 'Create Task' -> Fill title field -> Fill due date field -> Click Save -> See new task appear in the Kanban column
Navigate to /tareas -> Click 'Create Task' -> Leave title empty -> Click Save -> See validation error 'Title required' and task not created

features.name: Schedule Generator (Horarios) — Drag & Drop
features.description: Visual weekly scheduler that uses drag-and-drop to place subjects into weekday/time slots and supports reordering and removal.
user_flows: Navigate to /horarios -> Drag subject from bank to Monday 09:00 slot -> Reorder subjects within Monday by dragging -> Click clock icon on a scheduled item -> Edit time and confirm -> See subject updated in Monday slot
Navigate to /horarios -> Drag subject from bank to a weekday slot that is already occupied -> See conflict toast 'Slot occupied' -> Drag subject back to bank to cancel placement

features.name: Calendario
features.description: Academic calendar with monthly/weekly views, event export (.ics) and integration with schedule and exams.
user_flows: Navigate to /calendario -> Switch to month view -> Click 'Export .ics' -> See file download start and confirmation toast
Navigate to /calendario -> Click 'Export .ics' -> See toast 'Export failed: permission denied' -> Click Retry Export -> See retry attempt

features.name: Aether Vault (Second Brain)
features.description: Markdown hybrid vault with bidirectional links, a knowledge graph and automatic workspace containers for subjects.
user_flows: Navigate to /aether -> Click 'New Note' -> Type note title -> Type content including a [[Wiki]] link -> Save or wait for auto-save -> See new note listed and linked in the graph view
Navigate to /aether -> Click 'New Note' -> Type content -> Click Save -> See modal 'Encryption key required' -> Click 'Open Security Settings' -> See prompt to set passphrase

features.name: Aether Canvas (Spatial Canvas)
features.description: Infinite-position canvas for freeform mapping of architectures, diagrams and study artifacts.
user_flows: Navigate to /aether/canvas -> Click 'Add Node' -> Drag node to desired position -> Add text or resource to node -> See node saved in canvas and available on reload
Navigate to /aether/canvas -> Click 'Add Node' -> Attempt to import a very large file -> See 'Import failed: size limit' error -> Remove file and retry with smaller payload

features.name: Aether Chat (Assistant)
features.description: RAG chat that answers queries using only the user's private notes; API access is requested on-demand (divulgación progresiva).
user_flows: Navigate to /aether/chat -> Click 'Start Chat' -> Type question referencing my notes -> Press Send -> See AI response synthesized from my notes
Navigate to /aether/chat -> Type question -> Press Send -> See modal 'API Key required' -> Click 'Add API Key' -> Paste API Key -> Click Save -> See chat resume and response

features.name: Nexus Workspace — Editor & Database
features.description: Unified workspace with block editor (CRDT) and local relational DBs (Dexie) for executing on tracked knowledge.
user_flows: Navigate to /nexus -> Open NexusWorkspace -> Create new block document -> Type content -> See real-time local persistence and CRDT state saved
Navigate to /nexus/db -> Create new table record -> Fill fields -> Click Save -> See record appear in table view; if save fails see 'Retry Sync' toast

features.name: Nexus AI (Multi-source RAG)
features.description: Advanced AI chat that reasons over notes, documents and local databases using multi-source RAG aggregation.
user_flows: Navigate to /nexus/ai -> Open Nexus AI panel -> Select sources Notes and Database -> Type technical prompt -> Press Send -> See RAG-powered response referencing selected local sources

Navigate to /nexus/ai -> Type prompt -> Press Send -> See 'Network unavailable or AI Key missing' toast -> Click 'Use local DB only' -> See response generated from local data or a suggestion to add API Key

routes.description: List of subjects and their status

features.name: Schedule Generator
features.description: Drag and drop subjects to create a weekly schedule
user_interactions: Drag subject from bank to a weekday
Drag subject back to bank to remove from day
Edit subject time by clicking on clock icon

features.name: Subject Management
features.description: Track status and grades for subjects
user_interactions: Filter subjects by status or semester
Toggle subject status (pendiente, en curso, aprobada)

features.name: Task Management
user_interactions: Create new task with title and due date
